channel.title: Linux on Bedgirb
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Bedgirb

item.title: Linux cron jobs give you the power
item.description: As an Asian, I’m familiar with my parents always keeping a close eye on me, checking if I’m studying, gaming, or chatting. It’s like they have a background process running, giving those bombastic side eye 👀 glances. Similarly, Linux’s cron job operates silently in the background, automating tasks. I found this parallel intriguing: both involve monitoring and control. There is a cron daemon already inside Linux that helps you execute commands or scripts at predefined time intervals. We can automate tasks like
